description:
Open the pre-loaded portfolio at /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/managed_portfolio.xml. This EUR-denominated portfolio tracks 4 securities with existing buy positions.

Record NVIDIA Corp's 10-for-1 stock split on 2024-06-10. Record Allianz SE's FY2023 dividend on 2024-05-09 (ex-date) at €13.80 per share on 15 shares with 26.375% German withholding tax, deposited to 'Verrechnungskonto'.

Create a taxonomy called 'Asset Allocation' with hierarchy: 'Equity' (children: 'Growth', 'Dividend Income') and 'Fixed Income' (child: 'Bonds'). Assign NVIDIA → Growth (100%), Allianz → Dividend Income (100%), iShares Corp Bond → Bonds (100%). For Vanguard FTSE All-World, split: 70% Growth / 30% Dividend Income.

Save the file when all changes are complete.
